agentAbility.name: Hunting Time
agentAbility.description: Launches a TV missile that destroys marked lower-HP enemies and Traces others. Each destruction recharges the Ultimate for a short time.

agentTrait.name: Hunter's Eye
agentTrait.description: Aiming at an enemy for a short time reveals their critical zones.

primaryAttack.name: Single Shot
primaryAttack.description: Requires reload after each shot, most accurate when stationary.

tankAbilities.name: UAV Drone.
tankAbilities.description: Scouts the area and Traces enemies after lock-on.

tankAbilities.name: Top-Attack Missiles
tankAbilities.description: Lock on to one target or up to two Traced enemies for a missile strike.
